programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: Stadium Lockup
programme.desc: Protecting the stadium are highly trained men and women from law enforcement, private security teams and medics; new members of the team blend with seasoned veterans as the staff faces multiple challenges.

programme.title: Stadium Lockup
programme.desc: Tensions are at an all-time high between these rivaling fans when a fight quickly erupts requiring multiple personnel to break it up.

programme.title: Stadium Lockup
programme.desc: The security team is on high alert during scorching temperatures in Cleveland and fans tailgating in the heat hours before kickoff; from medical emergencies to a vaping ejection that escalates, the teams face challenges at every turn.

programme.title: Stadium Lockup
programme.desc: Protecting the stadium are highly trained men and women from law enforcement, private security teams and medics; in this episode, the security team escorts defiant smokers from the stadium while on high alert.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Indiana, a routine traffic stop spirals into family chaos; in Alabama a foot pursuit ends with one individual in shock; in Montana, officers encounter a motel guest who gives new meaning to shag carpeting.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Lawrence, officers respond to a different kind of accident; in Richland, a trespassing call turns into alleged illegal betting.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Jefferson, a traffic stop introduces officers to a chihuahua puppy. In Nye County, officers respond to an out-of-this-world call. In Lawrence, a traffic stop turns into a pursuit when a driver refuses to stop.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Greene County, a wallet reportedly left behind leads officers straight to a suspected thief's doorstep; in Missoula, police cautiously respond to reports of shots fired.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: Officers in Richland County investigate a suspected double carjacking; in Warwick, a driver causes a serious crash tied to road rage; in Salinas, police search for a suspect believed to be hiding in a residence.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Richland, police engage in two separate foot chases while searching for a suspect; in Tallahassee, officers respond to a rollover accident; in Richland, police witness a dramatic hit-and-run crash and pursue the fleeing driver.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: A K9 leads the charge after a Greene County pursuit; in Warwick, a homeowner's security footage captures a suspected crime in progress; in El Paso, officers respond to a tipsy visitor knocking on neighborhood doors.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: Police respond to a car accident in Nye County; in Richland County, a routine traffic stop reveals suspected drugs; in Warwick, a house fire prompts a rescue of trapped animals.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Greene County, a suspected stolen car investigation uncovers guns, drugs, and counterfeit cash; two cyclists draw an officer's attention in Pasco; in El Paso, a person in a T. rex costume causes a stir on the streets.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Richland, police engage in two separate foot chases while searching for a suspect; in Tallahassee, officers respond to a rollover accident; in Richland, police witness a dramatic hit-and-run crash and pursue the fleeing driver.

programme.desc: Back in Montebello, Kenny is determined to stop swearing by carrying around a cuss counter; Dave goes in big on a high-end locker; Ivy doesn't hit the bullseye when it counts; Dusty and Lupe hope to hear the pristine sounds of success.

programme.desc: If you play with fire, you're going to get burned; it's a lesson these drivers learned the hard way on this top ten special of "Road Wars.".

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: In Wooster, Ohio, a road rage incident escalates when one of the drivers follows the other back to his home; a driver in Georgia hits a stopped tow truck's ramp and soars over 120 feet; a fender bender in a Texas parking lot spins out of control.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A rideshare driver and his two passengers are pursued by an unknown vehicle on Long Island; an elderly woman in Serbia is hit by a reversing ambulance; a woman in Arizona is trapped inside a burning pickup; a man in Tennessee takes on a black bear after it targets his car-mounted cooler; a man in New York City confronts a sportscar driver for littering.

programme.desc: A driver burning rubber in Times Square nearly runs over an NYPD officer; a Florida police officer clings to the open door of a speeding vehicle when a suspect attempts to flee; a plane is forced to make an emergency landing.

programme.desc: At a red light in Arizona, a car sideswipes the door on another driver's vehicle during a heated road rage encounter; two drivers get into a yelling match as they attempt to squeeze by each other on a narrow street in the Boston suburbs.

programme.title: Road Wars

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A motorist struggles to break up a fistfight between drivers in New Jersey. A cyclist turns traffic vigilante in England and clashes with commuters. rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A dispute over a saved parking space leads to a brawl in New York. On a bridge in Connecticut, a confrontation between a driver and pedestrians escalates quickly. A sports car driver in Georgia turns off his traction control and pays the price into oncoming traffic. A minivan runs a red light as a man in a mobility scooter is crossing in California. In Malaysia, two vehicles engage in a fierce back-and-forth on the highway.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Customer Wars
programme.desc: At an Oregon summer camp, an employee confronts a delivery driver, and simple questions quickly turn into a heated clash. On the Los Angeles Metro, a mysterious argument between two riders erupts into a physical brawl. At a French Airport, armed forces storm a plane to forcibly remove an allegedly out-of-control bachelor party. In a Columbus parking lot, officers surround three individuals suspected of firing guns near a community pool.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Customer Wars
programme.desc: In Chappell Hill, Texas, a fast-food employee is confronted after a customer believes he was commenting on her weight. In Joliet, Illinois, an early-morning noise complaint at a gym escalates into a clash with police. In Okotoks, Canada, a quiet day at a phone repair shop is shattered when a car crashes through the storefront. And in Botswana, a couple's safari celebration takes a terrifying turn when an elephant charges.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Customer Wars
programme.desc: In California, a flower shop owner livestreams a standoff with a customer who appears to deny a simple request; at a Florida airport, a passenger's identification snafu escalates to a confrontation with police.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Customer Wars
programme.desc: A customer attempts to return an allegedly faulty phone card without a receipt in Ohio; a fight between two women, allegedly over one of the holiday season's hottest gaming consoles, turns physical in North Carolina.
